goal: Add a side-effect-free operator dry-run planner for BPK-067 cockpit patch application readiness, simulating application steps while keeping patch application, server mutation, route mutation, renderer changes, runtime, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call AICOS, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Cockpit server patch application can be dry-run planned without applying it.
Ready BPK-067 readiness and operator dry-run refs are required.
assumptions: Actual cockpit patch application requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing dry-run ref, and blocked readiness cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Server mutation, route mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-067 assessed cockpit server patch application readiness without applying patches.
